member.name: T:OpenCover.Framework.Model.SummarySkippedEntity
member.summary: A skipped entity that also carries a Summary object which is not always serialized

member.name: M:OpenCover.Framework.Model.SummarySkippedEntity.#ctor
member.summary: Initialise

member.name: P:OpenCover.Framework.Model.SummarySkippedEntity.Summary
member.summary: A Summary of results for a entity

member.name: M:OpenCover.Framework.Model.SummarySkippedEntity.ShouldSerializeSummary
member.summary: Control serialization of the Summary object

member.name: T:OpenCover.Framework.Model.IDocumentReference
member.summary: A point may have a document reference

member.name: P:OpenCover.Framework.Model.IDocumentReference.Document
member.summary: The document url

member.name: P:OpenCover.Framework.Model.IDocumentReference.FileId
member.summary: The document id after lookup

member.name: T:OpenCover.Framework.Model.Class
member.summary: An entity that contains methods

member.name: M:OpenCover.Framework.Model.Class.#ctor
member.summary: instantiate

member.name: P:OpenCover.Framework.Model.Class.FullName
member.summary: The full name of the class

member.name: P:OpenCover.Framework.Model.Class.Methods
member.summary: A list of methods that make up the class

member.name: M:OpenCover.Framework.Model.Class.MarkAsSkipped(OpenCover.Framework.Model.SkippedMethod)
member.summary: If a class was skipped by instrumentation, supply the reason why

member.name: T:OpenCover.Framework.Model.Method
member.summary: An method entity that can be instrumented

member.name: P:OpenCover.Framework.Model.Method.MetadataToken
member.summary: The MetadataToken used to identify this entity within the assembly

member.name: P:OpenCover.Framework.Model.Method.FullName
member.summary: The full name of the method (method-definition), includes return-type namespace-class::call-name(argument-types)

member.name: P:OpenCover.Framework.Model.Method.FileRef
member.summary: A reference to a file in the file collection (used to help visualisation)

member.name: P:OpenCover.Framework.Model.Method.SequencePoints
member.summary: A list of sequence points that have been produced for this method

member.name: P:OpenCover.Framework.Model.Method.BranchPoints
member.summary: A list of branch points that have been identified for this method

member.name: P:OpenCover.Framework.Model.Method.MethodPoint
member.summary: A method point to identify the entry of a method

member.name: P:OpenCover.Framework.Model.Method.Visited
member.summary: Has the method been visited

member.name: P:OpenCover.Framework.Model.Method.CyclomaticComplexity
member.summary: What is the cyclomatic complexity of this method.
member.remarks: Calculated using the Gendarme rules library

member.name: P:OpenCover.Framework.Model.Method.NPathComplexity
member.summary: What is the NPath complexity of this method.

member.name: P:OpenCover.Framework.Model.Method.SequenceCoverage
member.summary: What is the sequence coverage of this method

member.name: P:OpenCover.Framework.Model.Method.BranchCoverage
member.summary: What is the branch coverage of this method

member.name: P:OpenCover.Framework.Model.Method.CrapScore
member.summary: What is the crap score of this method based on the following calculation CRAP1(m) = comp(m)^2 * (1 – cov(m)/100)^3 + comp(m)

member.name: P:OpenCover.Framework.Model.Method.IsConstructor
member.summary: Is this method a constructor

member.name: P:OpenCover.Framework.Model.Method.IsStatic
member.summary: Is this method static

member.name: P:OpenCover.Framework.Model.Method.IsGetter
member.summary: Is this method a property getter

member.name: P:OpenCover.Framework.Model.Method.IsSetter
member.summary: Is this method a property setter

member.name: M:OpenCover.Framework.Model.Method.MarkAsSkipped(OpenCover.Framework.Model.SkippedMethod)
member.summary: Mark an entity as skipped

member.name: P:OpenCover.Framework.Model.Method.IsGenerated
member.summary: True if this.FullName matches generated-method-regex-pattern

member.name: P:OpenCover.Framework.Model.Method.CallName
member.summary: Method "::CallName(". (Name excluding return type, namespace and arguments)

member.name: T:OpenCover.Framework.Model.FileRef
member.summary: A file reference within the coverage session and is used to point to an existing File entity

member.name: P:OpenCover.Framework.Model.FileRef.UniqueId
member.summary: The uniqueid of a file in a coverage session

member.name: T:OpenCover.Framework.Model.File
member.summary: File details of a source file

member.name: M:OpenCover.Framework.Model.File.#ctor
member.summary: A standard constructor

member.name: P:OpenCover.Framework.Model.File.FullPath
member.summary: The path to file

member.name: T:OpenCover.Framework.Model.SkippedMethod
member.summary: Describes how a method or class was skipped

member.name: F:OpenCover.Framework.Model.SkippedMethod.Attribute
member.summary: Entity was skipped due to a matching exclusion attribute filter

member.name: F:OpenCover.Framework.Model.SkippedMethod.File
member.summary: Entity was skipped due to a matching exclusion file filter

member.name: F:OpenCover.Framework.Model.SkippedMethod.Filter
member.summary: Entity was skipped due to a matching exclusion module/class filter

member.name: F:OpenCover.Framework.Model.SkippedMethod.MissingPdb
member.summary: Entity was skipped due to a missing PDB

member.name: F:OpenCover.Framework.Model.SkippedMethod.Inferred
member.summary: Entity was skipped by inference (usually related to File filters)

member.name: F:OpenCover.Framework.Model.SkippedMethod.AutoImplementedProperty
member.summary: Entity (method) was skipped as it is an auto-implemented property.

member.name: F:OpenCover.Framework.Model.SkippedMethod.NativeCode
member.summary: Entity (method) was skipped as it is native code.

member.name: F:OpenCover.Framework.Model.SkippedMethod.Unknown
member.summary: Entity (method) was skipped for other reasons.

member.name: F:OpenCover.Framework.Model.SkippedMethod.FolderExclusion
member.summary: Entity (dll) was skipped due to folder exclusion.

member.name: F:OpenCover.Framework.Model.SkippedMethod.Delegate
member.summary: Entity (method) was skipped due to being a delegate.

member.name: F:OpenCover.Framework.Model.SkippedMethod.FSharpInternal
member.summary: Entity (method) was skipped due to being an F# internal implementation detail (in either a record or discriminated union type).

member.name: T:OpenCover.Framework.Model.CoverageSession
member.summary: A coverage session

member.name: M:OpenCover.Framework.Model.CoverageSession.#ctor
member.summary: initialise a coverage session

member.name: P:OpenCover.Framework.Model.CoverageSession.SessionId
member.summary: A unique session identifier

member.name: P:OpenCover.Framework.Model.CoverageSession.Summary
member.summary: A Summary of results for the session

member.name: P:OpenCover.Framework.Model.CoverageSession.Modules
member.summary: A list of modules that have been profiled under the session

member.name: P:OpenCover.Framework.Model.CoverageSession.Version
member.summary: The current version

member.name: T:OpenCover.Framework.Model.SkippedEntity
member.summary: The entity can be skipped from coverage but needs to supply a reason

member.name: P:OpenCover.Framework.Model.SkippedEntity.SkippedDueTo
member.summary: If this class has been skipped then this value will describe why

member.name: M:OpenCover.Framework.Model.SkippedEntity.ShouldSerializeSkippedDueTo
member.summary: If this class has been skipped then this value will allow the data to be serialized

member.name: M:OpenCover.Framework.Model.SkippedEntity.MarkAsSkipped(OpenCover.Framework.Model.SkippedMethod)
member.summary: Mark an entity as skipped

member.name: T:OpenCover.Framework.Model.TrackedMethodRef
member.summary: A reference to a tracked method

member.name: P:OpenCover.Framework.Model.TrackedMethodRef.UniqueId
member.summary: unique id assigned

member.name: P:OpenCover.Framework.Model.TrackedMethodRef.VisitCount
member.summary: The visit count

member.name: T:OpenCover.Framework.Model.TrackedMethod
member.summary: A method being tracked

member.name: P:OpenCover.Framework.Model.TrackedMethod.UniqueId
member.summary: unique id assigned

member.name: P:OpenCover.Framework.Model.TrackedMethod.MetadataToken
member.summary: The MetadataToken used to identify this entity within the assembly

member.name: P:OpenCover.Framework.Model.TrackedMethod.FullName
member.summary: The name of the method being tracked

member.name: P:OpenCover.Framework.Model.TrackedMethod.Strategy
member.summary: The reason/plugin why the method is being tracked

member.name: T:OpenCover.Framework.Model.BranchPoint
member.summary: a branch point

member.name: P:OpenCover.Framework.Model.BranchPoint.StartLine
member.summary: Line of the branching instruction

member.name: P:OpenCover.Framework.Model.BranchPoint.Path
member.summary: A path that can be taken

member.name: P:OpenCover.Framework.Model.BranchPoint.OffsetPoints
member.summary: List of OffsetPoints between Offset and EndOffset (exclusive)

member.name: M:OpenCover.Framework.Model.BranchPoint.ShouldSerializeOffsetPoints
member.summary: Should offset points be serialized

member.name: P:OpenCover.Framework.Model.BranchPoint.EndOffset
member.summary: Last Offset == EndOffset. Can be same as Offset

member.name: P:OpenCover.Framework.Model.BranchPoint.FileId
member.summary: The file associated with the supplied startline

member.name: P:OpenCover.Framework.Model.BranchPoint.Document
member.summary: The url to the document if an entry was not mapped to an id

member.name: T:OpenCover.Framework.Model.InstrumentationPoint
member.summary: An instrumentable point

member.name: P:OpenCover.Framework.Model.InstrumentationPoint.Count
member.summary: Return the number of visit points

member.name: M:OpenCover.Framework.Model.InstrumentationPoint.GetVisitCount(System.UInt32)
member.summary: Get the number of recorded visit points for this identifier
member.param: the sequence point identifier - NOTE 0 is not used

member.name: M:OpenCover.Framework.Model.InstrumentationPoint.AddVisitCount(System.UInt32,System.UInt32,System.Int32)
member.summary: Add a number of recorded visit ppints against this identifier
member.param: the sequence point identifier - NOTE 0 is not used
the id of a tracked method - Note 0 means no method currently tracking
the number of visit points to add

member.name: M:OpenCover.Framework.Model.InstrumentationPoint.#ctor
member.summary: Initialise

member.name: P:OpenCover.Framework.Model.InstrumentationPoint.VisitCount
member.summary: Store the number of visits

member.name: P:OpenCover.Framework.Model.InstrumentationPoint.UniqueSequencePoint
member.summary: A unique number

member.name: P:OpenCover.Framework.Model.InstrumentationPoint.Ordinal
member.summary: An order of the point within the method

member.name: P:OpenCover.Framework.Model.InstrumentationPoint.Offset
member.summary: The IL offset of the point

member.name: P:OpenCover.Framework.Model.InstrumentationPoint.IsSkipped
member.summary: Used to hide an instrumentation point

member.name: P:OpenCover.Framework.Model.InstrumentationPoint.TrackedMethodRefs
member.summary: The list of tracked methods

member.name: T:OpenCover.Framework.Model.Module
member.summary: The details of a module

member.name: M:OpenCover.Framework.Model.Module.#ctor
member.summary: simple constructor

member.name: P:OpenCover.Framework.Model.Module.ModulePath
member.summary: The full path name to the module

member.name: P:OpenCover.Framework.Model.Module.ModuleTime
member.summary: GetlastWriteTimeUtc

member.name: P:OpenCover.Framework.Model.Module.Aliases
member.summary: A list of aliases

member.name: P:OpenCover.Framework.Model.Module.ModuleName
member.summary: The name of the module

member.name: P:OpenCover.Framework.Model.Module.Files
member.summary: The files that make up the module

member.name: P:OpenCover.Framework.Model.Module.Classes
member.summary: The classes that make up the module

member.name: P:OpenCover.Framework.Model.Module.TrackedMethods
member.summary: Methods that are being tracked i.e. test methods

member.name: P:OpenCover.Framework.Model.Module.ModuleHash
member.summary: A hash of the file used to group them together (especially when running against mstest)

member.name: M:OpenCover.Framework.Model.Module.MarkAsSkipped(OpenCover.Framework.Model.SkippedMethod)
member.summary: Mark an entity as skipped

member.name: T:OpenCover.Framework.Model.Summary
member.summary: A summary of results

member.name: P:OpenCover.Framework.Model.Summary.NumSequencePoints
member.summary: The number of sequence points

member.name: P:OpenCover.Framework.Model.Summary.VisitedSequencePoints
member.summary: The number of sequence points visited

member.name: P:OpenCover.Framework.Model.Summary.NumBranchPoints
member.summary: The number of branch points

member.name: P:OpenCover.Framework.Model.Summary.VisitedBranchPoints
member.summary: The number of branch points visited

member.name: P:OpenCover.Framework.Model.Summary.SequenceCoverage
member.summary: What is the sequence coverage?

member.name: P:OpenCover.Framework.Model.Summary.BranchCoverage
member.summary: What is the branch coverage?

member.name: P:OpenCover.Framework.Model.Summary.MaxCyclomaticComplexity
member.summary: What is the maximum cyclomatic complexity.
member.remarks: Calculated using the Gendarme rules library

member.name: P:OpenCover.Framework.Model.Summary.MinCyclomaticComplexity
member.summary: What is the minimum cyclomatic complexity.
member.remarks: Calculated using the Gendarme rules library

member.name: P:OpenCover.Framework.Model.Summary.MaxCrapScore
member.summary: What is the maximum crap score

member.name: P:OpenCover.Framework.Model.Summary.MinCrapScore
member.summary: What is the minimum crap score.

member.name: P:OpenCover.Framework.Model.Summary.VisitedClasses
member.summary: What is the number of visited classes

member.name: P:OpenCover.Framework.Model.Summary.NumClasses
member.summary: What is the total number of classes

member.name: P:OpenCover.Framework.Model.Summary.VisitedMethods
member.summary: What is the number of visited methods

member.name: P:OpenCover.Framework.Model.Summary.NumMethods
member.summary: What is the total number of methods

member.name: T:OpenCover.Framework.Model.SequencePoint
member.summary: a sequence point

member.name: P:OpenCover.Framework.Model.SequencePoint.StartLine
member.summary: The start line of the sequence point

member.name: P:OpenCover.Framework.Model.SequencePoint.StartColumn
member.summary: The start column of the sequence point

member.name: P:OpenCover.Framework.Model.SequencePoint.EndLine
member.summary: The end line of the sequence point

member.name: P:OpenCover.Framework.Model.SequencePoint.EndColumn
member.summary: The end column of the sequence point

member.name: P:OpenCover.Framework.Model.SequencePoint.BranchExitsCount
member.summary: Count of merged branches
The number of branch exits

member.name: P:OpenCover.Framework.Model.SequencePoint.BranchExitsVisit
member.summary: Visit count of merged branches

member.name: P:OpenCover.Framework.Model.SequencePoint.FileId
member.summary: The file associated with the supplied startline

member.name: P:OpenCover.Framework.Model.SequencePoint.Document
member.summary: The url to the document if an entry was not mapped to an id

member.name: P:OpenCover.Framework.Model.SequencePoint.IsSingleCharSequencePoint
member.summary: Property

member.name: M:OpenCover.Framework.Model.SequencePoint.IsLineEqual(OpenCover.Framework.Model.SequencePoint)
member.summary: SonnarQube wants no more than 3 boolean conditions

member.name: M:OpenCover.Framework.Model.SequencePoint.IsColumnEqual(OpenCover.Framework.Model.SequencePoint)
member.summary: SonnarQube wants no more than 3 boolean conditions

member.name: M:OpenCover.Framework.Model.SequencePoint.IsPositionEqual(OpenCover.Framework.Model.SequencePoint)
member.summary: Is Start/End Line/Column equal

member.name: M:OpenCover.Framework.Model.SequencePoint.IsFileIdEqual(OpenCover.Framework.Model.SequencePoint)
member.summary: Is FileId equal? (If FileId is 0 then file is unknown)
